text_with_cta:
# HOOK

5 hidden gaps that kill 90% of funding applications (and how Nexus fixes them all in 30 days).

# PROBLEM

You've survived the startup grind. Your revenue's growing ($250k+), your customers love you. But when you apply for growth capital? Silence. Or worse: 'We regret to inform you...' for reasons you can't decipher. It's not your vision that's flawed—it's how you're forced to present it through generic templates and banker jargon while drowning in paperwork. That sinking feeling? It's knowing investors are rejecting you over fixable technicalities you can't even identify.

---
## Your Next Step

Go to goclearonline.cc and run your free Funding Readiness Audit. Our AI analyzes your business profile against 12 lender criteria in under 5 minutes. You'll see exactly where you stand, what's blocking approvals, and what to fix first.

No sales pitch. No fake urgency. Just a real picture of where your business stands with lenders right now.
